name: Unlock of a Resource that is not Locked
description: The product attempts to unlock a resource that is not currently locked, which depending on the locking implementation may cause memory corruption, state corruption, crashes, or unexpected modification of the resource or its metadata.
detection_pattern: CONTROL[unlock_operation] is invoked on STORAGE[resource] without a preceding CONTROL[lock_operation] on the same resource in the current execution path, or the lock was already released, causing an unpaired unlock that corrupts lock state
graph_query: CONTROL[unlock]→STORAGE[resource] without preceding CONTROL[lock] on same path
